description: Direct eval() where a closure created inside the eval writes back a captured caller-local scalar (forEach/reduce/map callbacks run synchronously during the eval). Engine round-3 milestone: copy-in reboxes any caller local captured by a fragment-internal closure into a shared heap box (mirroring the normal compiler's rebox-on-capture), so closure writes reach the box and copy-out reads the box back into the caller slot. Covers int/string accumulators, two captured vars, nested arrows, and escaping read closures. Matches Node.
